name: A fortified bank
description:
This building is one of the few that remain open in this besieged city.  From
the layout, you can tell that it is the bank for the citizens who have chosen
to entrust their valuables to the King's guard.  The man sitting behind the
highly fortified counter is the only one brave enough to work here.  A large
brass sign is mounted on the wall to the right of the man.
